table.empty: No invitation codes yet. Use the button above to create one.

dialog.maxUsesError: Please set the maximum uses to 1 or greater.

invitation.waitlistSecurityItem4: Email reveal actions require additional verification
invitation.waitlistRevealDesc: This action will be logged. Continue only if you have a legitimate reason.
